recordLookups.name: Get_Pay_Transactions_with_PPB_or_Invoice_Between_Date_Range_All
recordLookups.label: Get Pay Transactions with PPB or Invoice Between Date Range (All)
recordLookups.filterLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5 AND (6 OR 7) AND 8 AND 9

recordLookups.name: Get_Pay_Transactions_with_PPB_or_Invoice_Between_Date_Range_All_by_Client
recordLookups.label: Get Pay Transactions with PPB or Invoice Between Date Range (All) by Client
recordLookups.filterLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5 AND (6 OR 7) AND 8 AND 9 AND 10

recordLookups.name: Get_Pay_Transactions_with_PPB_or_Invoice_Between_Date_Range_Employee
recordLookups.label: Get Pay Transactions with PPB or Invoice Between Date Range (Employee)
recordLookups.filterLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5 AND 6 AND (7 OR 8) AND 9 AND 10

recordLookups.name: Get_Pay_Transactions_with_PPB_or_Invoice_Between_Date_Range_Employee_by_Client
recordLookups.label: Get Pay Transactions with PPB or Invoice Between Date Range (Employee) by Client
recordLookups.filterLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5 AND 6 AND (7 OR 8) AND 9 AND 10 AND 11

fields.name: Copy_1_of_TS_count_display
fields.fieldText:
Unable to submit Bulk Request Jobs.


Error:

{!$Flow.FaultMessage}

fields.name: No_Timesheets_Found_Before_PPB
fields.fieldText:
NO TIMESHEETS FOUND TO UNPROCESS.


TIMESHEETS CANNOT BE UNPROCESSED IF THEY ARE IN A PAY BATCH.

validationRule.errorMessage: "TS Last Modified From" datetime must be before "TS Last Modified To" datetime.

fields.name: Selected_start_date
fields.fieldText:
TS Start Date from: {!Start_Date}

TS End Date to: {!End_Date}

fields.name: Max_Warning
fields.fieldText: WARNING: Only the maximum limit of 500 rows are being shown from the total of {!var_Count} timesheets which match the selection criteria. You may need to run the process again after unprocessing the first 500.

value.stringValue: Name:160, tc9_et__Employee_Full_Name__c:137, tc9_et__Assignment__c:160, tc9_et__Assignment_Name__c:179, agx_Assignment_Type__c:100, tc9_et__Interpretation_Rule__c:165, tc9_et__Start_Date__c:113, tc9_et__End_Date__c:115, tc9_et__Total_Hours__c:122, tc9_et__Transaction_Creation_Status_Colour__c:265

Name:true, tc9_et__Employee_Full_Name__c:true, tc9_et__Assignment__c:false, tc9_et__Assignment_Name__c:true, agx_Assignment_Type__c:true, tc9_et__Interpretation_Rule__c:true, tc9_et__Start_Date__c:false, tc9_et__End_Date__c:false, tc9_et__Total_Hours__c:false, tc9_et__Transaction_Creation_Status_Colour__c:false

fields.name: TS_count_display
fields.fieldText:
{!var_TS_count} Timesheets successfully submitted for Bulk Unprocessing


Please allow a few minutes for all timesheets to complete unprocessing.
